allow: Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where \\"name='java.exe'\\" delete" 2>&1 && sleep 2 && echo "done")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force" 2>&1 && sleep 3 && netstat -ano | grep ":808" | grep LISTEN)
